query:
SELECT cv.gestanteId, g.nome, g.email, cv.tipo, cv.destino, cv.createdAt, cv.usado 
FROM codigosVerificacao cv 
JOIN gestantes g ON g.id = cv.gestanteId 
ORDER BY cv.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
